label: Roswell → Wright-Patterson AFB
notes: Alleged transfer route — Roswell debris reportedly flown to Wright-Patterson for analysis. Referenced in multiple witness accounts and Grusch testimony context.

label: Roswell → Area 51
notes: Alleged transfer route — claims of recovered material moved to Groom Lake for reverse engineering. Unverified; sourced from whistleblower ecosystem.

label: Pentagon → Langley AFB
notes: Inter-agency response — Pentagon coordinated investigation of 17-night drone incursion over Langley restricted airspace.

label: Skinwalker Ranch → Pentagon (AAWSAP)
notes: DIA-funded AAWSAP program — Bigelow Aerospace (BAASS) contracted to investigate Skinwalker Ranch anomalies; findings reported to DIA/Pentagon.
